- [W][patterns:agent:main] [Sat 2026-03-21 14:50 GMT+8] 能记住我们每一个对话吗

[END UNTRUSTED DATA]
</relevant-memories>

[cron:e477f7c0-f8ae-468b-a68f-52d25ad1d8a1 OpenClaw 每日备份] 执行 OpenClaw 全量备份任务：
1. 打包 C:\Users\Administrator\.openclaw 到 D:\openclaw-backup-$(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd')
2. 用 robocopy 复制（排除 node_modules 和 .git 避免过大）
3. 初始化 git 仓库（如尚未初始化）
4. 添加所有文件并提交，commit message：Backup $(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm')
5. 推送 GitHub：remote: https://github.com/SUPPAN550/openclaw.git 分支：backups/$(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd')
6. 使用 Token: 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
7. 推送完成后发送确认消息
Current time: Sunday, March 22nd, 2026 — 17:51 (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-03-22 09:51 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.thinking: Let me execute this backup task step by step.
Git repo exists. Now let's set up the backup directory and run robocopy.

arguments.command: $dateStr = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd'; $backupDir = "D:\openclaw-backup-$dateStr"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $backupDir | Out-Null; robocopy 'C:\Users\Administrator\.openclaw' $backupDir /MIR /XD node_modules .git /R:3 /W:5 /NP /NC /NDL; "Backup copy done: $backupDir"
